artifact: Route Owner Acknowledgement Follow Up Decision Memo
gmail_reply_state: one acknowledgement remains no new substantive route reply

decision_states.name: recent_acknowledgement_window
decision_states.trigger: acknowledgement exists and no substantive guidance has arrived
allowed_actions: monitor Gmail before new field action
blocked_actions: new message only to stay visible

decision_states.name: one_concise_follow_up_after_real_trigger
decision_states.trigger: route owner asks for shorter packet, a public deadline makes route fit time sensitive, a new artifact materially reduces review burden, or a reasonable waiting period has passed
allowed_actions: send one concise audited follow up
ask for wrong route better owner not fit or useful next review

decision_states.name: stop_and_do_not_follow_up
decision_states.trigger: not fit, no response after bounded follow up, duplicative route, or next message requires institutional authority
allowed_actions: close route as no further action for now
reopen only after new factual trigger

decision_states.name: substantive_reply_received
decision_states.trigger: route owner names better owner, asks concrete question, requests meeting, or asks for proposal data deployment validation ethics budget or institutional details
allowed_actions: map reply to smallest truthful package
prepare response only after source support and audit

minimum_follow_up_question: Which of these is the right next state: wrong route, better owner, not fit, or useful next review.
